scope: Paid (Google Ads) visits only. US visitors. Internal/test visits excluded.
method: Based on PostHog session recordings for paid (Google Ads) visitors: each visit's start time, landing page, clicks, form activity and outcome. Anything unusual (such as an odd click pattern) is flagged for review and confirmed before being reported as an issue, rather than assumed.

posthog.filter: Paid Search channel, US, test visits excluded

reconciliation.note: Google Ads paid-click figures for June 16 were not yet available at capture time: the conversion dashboard's June 16 update ran unattended and carried all sources (including the Google Ads daily series) forward from June 15, so June 16 has no posted paid-click count yet. PostHog recorded 2 paid US visits on June 16, both landing on the Madison residential roofing page on mobile - one 6-second bounce and one visitor who browsed for about a minute and opened several FAQ answers, with no contact-form typing. No form starts and no submissions. Paid-click coverage for June 16 will reconcile on a later run once Google Ads posts the day.

sessions.label: Visit 1
sessions.verdict: Came in from a Google ad to the Madison residential roofing page on a mobile device, stayed about 6 seconds with no taps or form typing, then left (a quick bounce).

sessions.label: Visit 2
sessions.verdict: Came in from a Google ad to the Madison residential roofing page on a mobile device and browsed for about a minute, opening several of the page's FAQ answers. No contact-form typing and no submission before leaving.
flags: Higher number of taps (13) with no form typing - reviewed in the recording: the taps were the visitor opening FAQ answers on the page (engaged reading), not a sign of friction. No phone tap or error observed.

insights.headline: 2 recorded paid visits on June 16, no form activity
insights.body: PostHog captured 2 paid US visits on June 16, both arriving from Google Ads to the Madison residential roofing page on mobile. One was a 6-second bounce; the other browsed for about a minute and opened several FAQ answers. Neither started or submitted the contact form.

insights.headline: Google Ads click count for June 16 not yet posted
insights.body: The conversion dashboard's June 16 update ran unattended and carried the Google Ads daily series forward from June 15, so there is no posted paid-click figure for June 16 yet. Paid-click coverage for the day will reconcile on a later run.

insights.headline: Both visits landed on the Madison residential roofing page
insights.body: Every recorded paid visit on June 16 came from a Google ad to the Madison residential roofing page on a mobile device - one quick bounce and one engaged browse of about a minute.

insights.headline: One visit flagged and cleared
insights.body: The longer visit showed a higher number of taps (13) with no form typing. Reviewed in the recording, the taps were the visitor opening the page's FAQ answers (engaged reading), not friction. No submissions, phone taps or confirmed friction on June 16.

data_notes: Window: June 16, 2026 (US Central). Each visit is dated by its exact start time in US Central time.
Scope: paid (Google Ads) visits only, US visitors, internal and test visits excluded.
Privacy: visitor names and emails are not shown. Visits are referenced by anonymous labels and recording links only.

Paid clicks for June 16: not yet available. The conversion dashboard's June 16 update ran unattended and carried the Google Ads daily series forward from June 15, so no June 16 paid-click figure is posted yet; it will reconcile on a later run.

Both recorded visits browsed on mobile and left with no form typing; there were no form starts, submissions, phone taps or confirmed friction on June 16. The longer visit's taps were FAQ openings (reviewed and cleared).
Weekly totals (June 10-16): 23 paid clicks across June 10-15 (June 16 not yet posted), 18 recorded visits, 0 form starts, 0 submissions.

week_summary.captureRate: 70% (June 10-15; June 16 paid clicks not yet posted)

headline_state: Paid visitor sessions for June 16 (US Central). 2 recorded paid visits, both on the Madison residential roofing page on mobile - one 6-second bounce and one ~1-minute browse that opened several FAQ answers - with no form typing and 0 submissions. One visit was flagged for a closer look (more taps, no typing) and cleared as FAQ reading. Google Ads paid-click count for June 16 was not yet posted (conversion dashboard carried it forward from June 15) and will reconcile on a later run.
